description: Automates attendance operations including clock-in/out (出退勤打刻), paid leave requests (有給申請), and monthly attendance closing (勤怠締め). Navigates to the attendance system, performs the target action, and verifies the result.

steps_hint: Navigate to attendance system login page
hints._comment: Pattern A: fully automatable once authenticated. Can be scheduled for daily execution at start/end of business hours.
